title: FortiAppSec Cloud – Getting Started Guide
description: Intro guide to FortiAppSec Cloud covering onboarding, core concepts, deployment options, and initial configuration for protecting web apps and APIs.

title: FortiAppSec Web Application Firewall (WAF) Guide
description: Configuration guide for FortiAppSec WAF policies, security profiles, and protections against common web threats such as OWASP Top 10.

title: FortiAppSec Global Server Load Balancing (GSLB) Guide
description: Guide to configuring GSLB in FortiAppSec, including traffic distribution, health checks, failover, and multi-region high availability.

title: FortiAppSec Advanced Bot Protection (ABP) Guide
description: Documentation for Advanced Bot Protection, covering bot detection, mitigation policies, behavioral analysis, and tuning for good vs malicious automation.

title: FortiAppSec Threat Analytics Guide
description: Reference for using Threat Analytics to visualize attacks, investigate events, correlate security data, and tune WAF and security policies.

title: FortiAppSec Client-Side Protection Guide
description: Guide to configuring client-side protection, including JavaScript monitoring, form and script control, and defense against Magecart-style and browser-based attacks.
